name: Joey Bishop
abstract: Joseph Abraham Gottlieb (February 3, 1918 – October 17, 2007), known professionally as Joey Bishop, was an American entertainer who appeared on television as early as 1948 and eventually starred in his own weekly comedy series playing a talk/variety show host, then later hosted a late-night talk show with Regis Philbin as his young sidek…

concerts.label: Children's Asthma Research Institute and Hospital 3rd Annual Parade of Stars

about_quotes.evidence: The transcript mentions Joey Bishop in the context of Frank Sinatra's show and Tommy Dorsey's engagement, but the interviewee (Cliff Leeman) does not describe a personal interaction, professional collaboration, or direct relationship with Joey Bishop.
